text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Perfectly... fine! Everybody's wishing me... a
happy birthday...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
And I'm so grateful... Whenever I try to say
thanks... I'm b-breathless...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! So maybe we shouldn't mention it?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: But, but... I'd be so sad!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Just... wait until tomorrow! I need a day... to feel
better!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: G-got it! I'll wish you the best when it's not your birthday!
